name: screenpipe
description: screenpipe turns your computer into a personal AI that knows everything you've done. record. search. automate. all local, all private, all yours.
summaryZh: screenpipe turns your computer into a personal AI that knows everything you've done. record. search. automate. all local, all private, all yours. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
